name: blog-jurenites
description: Storybook and frontend component workspace for the Blog Jurenites Drupal theme.

scripts.build:figma-sync: npm run build:tokens && node scripts/figma/to-tokens-studio.mjs && node scripts/figma/build-design-system-sync.mjs
scripts.build:all: npm run build:tokens && node scripts/build-theme.mjs && npm run build-storybook
